hero.subtitle: My name is Ivan and I'm here to help you
hero.cta: Let's get to know each other

about.name: Ivan Roganov
about.p1: With 25 years of experience in IT, I've been programming since 1999, honing my skills and expertise across multiple areas of technology.
about.p2: Since 2004, I've gained hands-on programming experience. Over the years, I've developed a strong leading teams and managing projects, applying my knowledge to problem-solving approach, believing that every issue can be fixed.
about.p3: I have successfully managed over 20 failing IT projects in the past 15 years, turning them around and making them operational. I am confident in my ability to tackle any project, no matter how challenging.
about.p4: There isn't a program that can't be fixed, and there isn't an IT system that can't be made operational.
about.p5: In my career, I've learned that no program is beyond repair, and no IT system is beyond restoration. There's always a way to fix it and make it better.

contact.title: Get in Touch
services: Software development. Solving any IT-related problems
Anything I can help you with
contact.callText2: I would love to hear from you
